blocks.text: Match preview: Finland face Portugal in 2nd T20I (T20) on Sat, 4 Jul, 2026, 1:30 pm at Kerava National Cricket Ground Kerava. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 19°C / Low 15°C · Rain: 0.7 mm · Wind: up to 12 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
